title: docs: drop EC2 image/text refs after gen.pollinations.ai cutover
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We've updated our internal docs and AI dev skills to reflect the big move to Cloudflare Workers. Sweeping away the old EC2 cobwebs!
gist.summary: Updated internal documentation and Claude Code skills to reflect the migration of image and text generation from legacy EC2 services to the new Cloudflare Worker.
gist.impact: Developers and AI agents will now use the correct Cloudflare endpoints and debugging tools instead of stale EC2 references.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee cleaning up old server boxes while the Nomnom creature eats deprecated documentation and old scripts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a stack of old dusty server manuals, while the cute bee mascot sweeps the floor with a tiny broom. A glowing modern server rack sits in the background. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a stack of old dusty server manuals, while the cute bee mascot sweeps the floor with a tiny broom.
